applicationBuild.title: Build Type
applicationBuild.subtitle: Select the way of building your code
applicationBuild.alertRich: Builders can consume significant memory and CPU resources (recommended: 4+ GB RAM and 2+ CPU cores). For production environments, please review our <guide>Production Guide</guide> for best practices and optimization recommendations. Builders are suitable for development and prototyping purposes when you have sufficient resources available.

dockerfile.dockerFilePlaceholder: Path of your docker file (default: Dockerfile)
dockerfile.buildStageDesc: Allows you to target a specific stage in a Multi-stage Dockerfile. If empty, Docker defaults to build the last defined stage.

nixpacks.publishDirDesc: Allows you to serve a single directory via NGINX after the build phase. Useful if the final build assets should be served as a static site.

railpack.descRich: Select a Railpack version or choose manual to enter a custom version. <releases>View releases</releases>
